text.title: Living Documentation Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure for applying Living Documentation. Each step lists input, action, and output. Pause and surface the artefact when output is produced.

step.name: wire-auto-generation
step.action: Add API reference + CHANGELOG generators with markers.

step.name: enforce-hand-vs-auto-split
step.action: Pin hand-authored sections; reject auto-generation attempts.

decision-gate.p: After the final step, the artefact MUST satisfy the output contract in content/02-output-contract.xml before downstream consumers read it.
